identity.title: Full-Stack Software Engineer
identity.tagline: Building AI-powered software solutions, agentic systems, and functional full-stack applications.
identity.location: Brooklyn, New York (Previously San Francisco Bay Area)

professional_experience.focus: Full-stack development, system architecture, and deployment strategies.

education.degree: Master of Science in Computer Science

active_projects.name: LifeOS / Atman Project
active_projects.description: Designing and architecting an AI-powered personal assistant intended to function as a comprehensive operating system for daily workflows and life management.

active_projects.name: Robotics & Python Mentorship
active_projects.description: Developing lesson plans and guiding a high school student through foundational Python programming and applied robotics concepts.

active_projects.name: Co-Evolution of AI and Humanity
active_projects.description: Scripting a YouTube video essay exploring the philosophical and practical themes of co-evolution between human consciousness and artificial intelligence.

philosophy_and_culture.cinema: Deep appreciation for sci-fi films exploring consciousness and AI, such as 'Interstellar' and 'Arrival'.
philosophy_and_culture.institutions: Frequenting the Metropolitan Museum of Art, Lincoln Center, and the NY Philharmonic.

hobbies_and_lifestyle.photography: Shooting with Nikon mirrorless systems, specifically focusing on astrophotography, stacking exposures of the Milky Way, and capturing NYC landmarks.
hobbies_and_lifestyle.coffee: Specialty brewing enthusiast; trained in Barista Fundamentals at Counter Culture Coffee and frequently brewing beans from roasters like La Cabra.
hobbies_and_lifestyle.fitness: Bouldering at Brooklyn Boulders, practicing yoga and meditation, and playing tennis in Prospect Park.
hobbies_and_lifestyle.culinary: Vegetarian cooking and meal prepping, exploring diverse flavor profiles across Indian, Thai, and Mexican cuisines.
hobbies_and_lifestyle.home: Cultivating a container garden with cilantro and mint, and curating a signature sandalwood and fresh-cut grass fragrance profile.
